case_title: TARCISIO HERNANDEZ VS. NIK ZEYNALNIA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $75.00 SERVED JUN-06-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GDI INSURANCE AGENCY, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2013 - JUDGMENT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, TARCISIO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO GDI INSURANCE AGENCY, INC BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-22-2013 AT 6:30 PM.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,819.82 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, TARCISIO AS TO DEFENDANT ZEYNALNIA, NIK GDI INSURANCE AGENCY, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT GDI INSURANCE. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---DOULAS HAACKE. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY FARSI INTERPRETER--GILBERT TIDERMO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $120.00 SERVED JUN-09-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZEYNALNIA, NIK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, TARCISIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZEYNALNIA, NIK $1,668.93 PRINCIPAL, $150.89 INTEREST, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,939.82, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST GDI INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
